description_long: This is a modern two-story house set within a walled rectangular lot, featuring a flat roof and a mix of white and natural wood exterior finishes. The property includes a spacious front yard with manicured lawns, a driveway leading to a garage, and a side garden with a row of vibrant purple-blossomed trees. The house has large, horizontally oriented windows, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. Outdoor living spaces include a patio and a rooftop terrace, both accessible from the main structure. The landscaping is thoughtfully arranged, with trees, shrubs, and paved walkways complementing the clean architectural lines of the house.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, wood and white finishes, surrounded by landscaped gardens and a driveway.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the rear corner, highlighting the rooftop terrace, backyard, and the side garden with purple-blossomed trees.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the front, showcasing the main entryway, driveway, garage, and the lush front lawn.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the house from the opposite rear corner, emphasizing the backyard, patio, and the side garden with trees.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a side perspective, focusing on the garage, driveway, and the symmetrical arrangement of windows and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide door, minimal steps, and a covered porch integrated into the facade with clean lines and no ornate detailing.
